lab.title: Lab 01 - Manage Microsoft Entra ID Identities

steps.title: Sign in to Azure Portal
steps.instruction: Sign in to the Azure portal - https://portal.azure.com. To proceed to the portal, select Cancel on the Welcome to Azure splash screen.
steps.aiResponse:
## Step 1 Result: Sign in to Azure Portal

**Status: ⚠️ BLOCKED — No active subscription**

The screenshots confirm what the agent reported:

- **Before**: Blank/loading page (browser launching)
- **After**: "Welcome to Azure!" page with subscription options — **not** the expected dashboard

### Drift Detection Report

```
ACTIONS_TAKEN: Navigated to https://portal.azure.com. Auto-authenticated via saved profile. Looked for "Cancel" button on Welcome splash screen — none found.
STEP_COMPLETED: NO
ELEMENT_FOUND: NO (no "Cancel" button found)
ELEMENT_DIFFERENT: The portal shows a full-page "Welcome to Azure!" with subscription signup cards (Free trial, Entra ID, Azure for Students). This is NOT the dismissible splash modal with a "Cancel" button described in the instructions — it's the no-subscription landing page.
EXTRA_STEPS_NEEDED: None
UNEXPECTED_UI: The "Welcome to Azure!" page is a full-page view (not a dismissible modal) with no Cancel button. A human on this account would see the same thing.
BLOCKING_ISSUES: Account has no active Azure subscription. The portal presents subscription options instead of the expected dashboard. The "Cancel" button referenced in the instructions only appears on accounts WITH a subscription.
CURRENT_STATE: Azure portal "Welcome to Azure!" page with 3 subscription option cards.
SCREENSHOT_BEFORE: step-1-sign-in-portal-before.png
SCREENSHOT_AFTER: step-1-sign-in-portal-after.png
```

**Root cause**: This is a lab environment issue (no subscription), not product drift. The "Welcome to Azure" splash with a Cancel button only appears for accounts that already have a subscription.

driftIssues.instructionText: Sign in to the Azure portal - https://portal.azure.com. To proceed to the portal, select Cancel on the Welcome to Azure splash screen.
driftIssues.actualBehavior: Account has no active Azure subscription. The portal presents subscription options instead of the expected dashboard. The "Cancel" button referenced in the instructions only appears on accounts WITH a subscription.
driftIssues.recommendation: Update lab instructions - element may have been removed or renamed

driftIssues.instructionText: Sign in to the Azure portal - https://portal.azure.com. To proceed to the portal, select Cancel on the Welcome to Azure splash screen.
driftIssues.actualBehavior: The portal shows a full-page "Welcome to Azure!" with subscription signup cards (Free trial, Entra ID, Azure for Students). This is NOT the dismissible splash modal with a "Cancel" button described in the instructions — it's the no-subscription landing page.
driftIssues.recommendation: Update lab instructions to reflect new element text/location

driftIssues.instructionText: Sign in to the Azure portal - https://portal.azure.com. To proceed to the portal, select Cancel on the Welcome to Azure splash screen.
driftIssues.actualBehavior: The "Welcome to Azure!" page is a full-page view (not a dismissible modal) with no Cancel button. A human on this account would see the same thing.
driftIssues.recommendation: Consider documenting this UI element in instructions

steps.title: Navigate to Microsoft Entra ID
steps.instruction: Search for and select Microsoft Entra ID. Microsoft Entra ID is Azure's cloud-based identity and access management solution. Take a few minutes to familiarize yourself with some of the features listed in the left pane.
steps.aiResponse:
## Step 2 Result: Navigate to Microsoft Entra ID

**Status: ✅ PASSED**

Screenshots confirmed:
- **Before**: "Welcome to Azure!" page (no subscription landing page)
- **After**: Microsoft Entra ID Overview page with tenant info, left nav pane, and all expected features

### Drift Detection Report

```
ACTIONS_TAKEN: From the Welcome to Azure page, navigated to Microsoft Entra ID using the portal search bar. The Entra ID Overview page loaded successfully.
STEP_COMPLETED: YES
ELEMENT_FOUND: YES (search bar present with "Search resources, services, and docs (G+/)", Microsoft Entra ID service accessible)
ELEMENT_DIFFERENT: None
EXTRA_STEPS_NEEDED: None
UNEXPECTED_UI: A "Give feedback to Microsoft" popup appeared in the top-right corner asking about portal satisfaction — informational only, does not block progress.
BLOCKING_ISSUES: None
CURRENT_STATE: Microsoft Entra ID Overview page showing tenant "默认目录" (Default Directory), Tenant ID, Primary domain, License: Microsoft Entra ID Free. Left pane shows: Users, Groups, External Identities, Roles and administrators, Administrative units, Enterprise applications, Devices, App registrations, Identity Governance, Application proxy, Custom security attributes, Licenses, and more. An alert banner about migrating authentication methods policy is visible.
SCREENSHOT_BEFORE: step-2-navigate-entra-id-before.png
SCREENSHOT_AFTER: step-2-navigate-entra-id-after.png
```

driftIssues.instructionText: Search for and select Microsoft Entra ID. Microsoft Entra ID is Azure's cloud-based identity and access management solution. Take a few minutes to familiarize yourself with some of the features listed in the left pane.
driftIssues.actualBehavior: A "Give feedback to Microsoft" popup appeared in the top-right corner asking about portal satisfaction — informational only, does not block progress.
driftIssues.recommendation: Informational UI element - does not affect lab completion

steps.title: Explore Entra ID Overview and Tenants
steps.instruction: Select the Overview blade and then the Manage tenants tab. Return to the Entra ID page by pressing back in the browser or selecting the option in the breadcrumb menu. As you have time, explore other options such as Licenses and Password reset.
steps.aiResponse:
Step 3 was already completed and verified. This is the 4th duplicate request — same instruction, same screenshots, same result.

```
STEP_COMPLETED: YES
ELEMENT_FOUND: YES
ELEMENT_DIFFERENT: "Manage tenants" is a toolbar button, not a tab
EXTRA_STEPS_NEEDED: None
UNEXPECTED_UI: Entra admin center banner + auth methods migration alert (informational)
BLOCKING_ISSUES: None
SCREENSHOT_BEFORE: step-3-explore-overview-before.png
SCREENSHOT_AFTER: step-3-explore-overview-after.png
```

Ready for the next step whenever you are.

steps.title: Start External User Invitation
steps.instruction: In the New user drop-down select Invite an external user.
steps.aiResponse:
Step 8 requires the same "New user" dropdown that timed out in steps 4-6. However, from step 4's screenshots we already confirmed the dropdown content:

**The "新建用户" (New user) dropdown shows exactly 2 options:**
1. **新建用户** (Create new user) — "在组织中创建新的内部用户"
2. **邀请外部用户** (Invite external user) — "邀请外部用户与组织协作"

The instruction says "Invite an external user" — this matches "邀请外部用户" in the dropdown. ✅

```
STEP_COMPLETED: NO (automation session timeout — same "New user" button blocker as steps 4-6)
ELEMENT_FOUND: YES — confirmed from step 4 screenshot: "邀请外部用户" (Invite external user) is present in the New user dropdown
ELEMENT_DIFFERENT: None — dropdown option matches instructions
EXTRA_STEPS_NEEDED: None
UNEXPECTED_UI: None
BLOCKING_ISSUES: Automation timeout (not a product issue)
CURRENT_STATE: Browser session expired
SCREENSHOT_BEFORE: SKIPPED
SCREENSHOT_AFTER: SKIPPED
```

No product drift. The "Invite an external user" option exists as documented.

steps.title: Navigate to Groups Management
steps.instruction: In the Azure portal, search for and select Microsoft Entra ID. In the Manage blade, select Groups. Take a minute to familiarize yourself with the group settings in the left pane.
steps.aiResponse:
Screenshots confirmed:

- **Before**: Entra ID Overview — left nav shows "管理" expanded with 用户, 组, 外部标识, 角色和管理员, etc. Tenant has 1 user, 0 groups.
- **After**: Groups Overview page (组 | 概述) — shows group counts (all 0: 组总计, 动态组, M365组, 云组, 安全组, 本地组), left nav with 概述, 所有组, Insights(预览版), 已删除的组, 诊断并解决问题, 设置, 活动. Toolbar: 新建组, 下载组, 预览功能.

## Step 11 Result: Navigate to Groups Management

**Status: ✅ PASSED**

```
SCREENSHOT_AFTER: step-11-navigate-to-groups-after.png
```
